creator: david.guyot@europecamions-interactive.com
text:
(In reply to Larry Rosenman from comment #8)
Great! After svn co https://svn0.us-east.freebsd.org/base/releng/11.0/ /usr/src/, I was able to make build deinstall reinstall. There was the problem. Thank you very much for your help and patience for my noobness!
